bird.name: 钉踝百灵
bird.summary: The spike-heeled lark (Chersomanes albofasciata) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae. It is found in southern Africa.

relations.subject: 钉踝百灵
relations.evidence: It is found in southern Africa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 钉踝百灵
relations.evidence: It is found in southern Africa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
